title: Contract Event Dashboard
description: Build a real-time event monitor for any smart contract — poll decoded event logs and display a live activity feed for any protocol or token.
useCase: Build a live protocol dashboard that shows every decoded event emitted by a smart contract — e.g. Swap, Mint, Transfer, Approval — in a real-time activity feed.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain where the contract is deployed
keyParams.contractAddress: Smart contract address to monitor for decoded events
keyParams.startingBlock: Block height to start scanning from
keyParams.endingBlock: Block height to stop scanning at
